JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR.title: Astral Skill
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR.description: Mystical skills powered by Astral Energy. Their values are influenced by the Astral Skill's quality.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCEPOWER.title: Endurance
JIANGXIAOMOD-PASSIVE.title: Passive Astral Skill
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODUNARMED.title: Unarmed Combat
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODUNARMED.descrip: Represents unarmed fighting techniques. Playing this type of card increases Unarmed Combat points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBLADE.title: Xia Blade Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBLADE.descripti: Represents the techniques of the Xia Blade Style. Playing this type of card increases Xia Blade Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBOW.title: Archery Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBOW.description: Represents proficiency with bows and arrows. Playing this type of card increases Archery Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODDAGGER.title: Dagger Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODDAGGER.descript: Represents proficiency with daggers. Playing this type of card increases Dagger Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODHALBERD.title: Sky-Square Halberd Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODHALBERD.descrip: Represents proficiency with the Sky-Square Halberd. Playing this type of card increases Sky-Square Halberd Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODCOMBATKNIFE.des: Represents proficiency with combat knives. Playing this type of card increases Combat Knife Mastery points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBASICARTS.title: Basic Mastery
JIANGXIAOMOD-JIANGXIAOMODBASICARTS.descr: Represents the total combined level of all weapon proficiencies.
